programme.title: 💨 2.1m @ 16s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With this onshore wind, those 2.1m waves will be closing out all the way to Baleal.
🌊 Swell: 2.1m @ 16s 💨 Wind: 31.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 50.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 1.8m

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.8m @ 15s CROSS
programme.desc:
